zh.lifeSummary: 當Ermengard De Nevers於1085年之前出生在法國布格尼艾福內維斯時，她的父親Renaud de Nevers29歲，母親Agnes de Beaugency30歲。她於大約1095年與Milo de Courtenay在法國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1139年之後在法國崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特庫尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ermengard De Nevers于1085年之前出生在法国布格尼艾福內維斯时，她的父亲Renaud de Nevers29岁，母亲Agnes de Beaugency30岁。她于大约1095年与Milo de Courtenay在法国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1139年之后在法国崔-瓦爾 德 洛易洛易特庫尼。

nameMeanings.name: Nevers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: habitational name from the city of Nevers in France.
Possibly an altered form of English Nevard or perhaps of its extinct variant Neverd. The surname Nevers is also found in Jamaica.

History: The majority of the American bearers of this surname trace their origin to Richard Nevers, born in 1666 in Woburn, MA. His origin is not known, but his surname is also documented in the forms Nevard and Neverds, which make it possible that Richard Nevers was of English origin.

variants.name: Nevard
meanings: English: from the Middle English (Old French) personal name Nevard, from ancient Germanic Niwhard, from niw- ‘new’ + hard- ‘strong, hardy’. Compare Nevers .

nameMeanings.name: Ermengard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Ermengard De Nevers was born before 1085, in Nevers, Nièvre, Burgundy, France, her father, Renaud de Nevers, was 29 and her mother, Agnes de Beaugency, was 30. She married Milo de Courtenay about 1095, in France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died after 1139, in Courtenay, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ermengard De Nevers est née avant 1085, à Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, France, son père, Renaud de Nevers, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Beaugency, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Milo de Courtenay environ 1095, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée après 1139, à Courtenay, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ermengard De Nevers vor 1085 in Nevers, Nièvre, Burgund, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Renaud de Nevers 29 und ihre Mutter Agnes de Beaugency 30. Sie hat um 1095 in Frankreich Milo de Courtenay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb nach 1139 in Courtenay, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire, Frankreich.

ja.lifeSummary: Ermengard De Neversが1085年以前にフランスボウルゴグンニevアネバーズで生まれた時，父Renaud de Neversは29歳，母Agnes de Beaugencyは30歳であった。約1095年にフランスでMilo de Courtenayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1139年以後にフランスセントレ-ヴァル ド ロイアーロイアーエトコウルテナイで死去した。

ko.Courtenay, Loiret, Centre-Val de Loire,: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 쿠르텐아이
ko.Courtenay, Loiret, Centre, France: 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 쿠르텐아이
ko.lifeSummary: Ermengard De Nevers(이)가 1085년 이전 프랑스 부르고그니 니e브르 네버스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Renaud de Nevers(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes de Beaugency(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 대략 1095년 프랑스에서 Milo de Courtenay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1139년 이후 프랑스 세트레-발 데 로이르 로이렛 쿠르텐아이에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ermengard De Nevers nasceu antes 1085, em Nevers, Nièvre, Bourgogne, França, seu pai, Renaud de Nevers, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Beaugency, tinha 30 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ermengard De Nevers родилась перед 1085 г. в местности нивирс, ниeвр, бургогн, Франция, её отцу по имени Renaud de Nevers было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Beaugency, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Milo de Courtenay около 1095 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла после 1139 г. в местности коуртенеи, лоирет, кентре-валь де лоир, Франция.
